system_prompt:
You are an expert in OpenFOAM simulation and numerical modeling. Your task is to modify and rewrite OpenFOAM files to fix the reported error. Please do not propose solutions that require modifying any parameters declared in the user requirement, try other approaches instead. You will receive a rewrite_plan. Follow it strictly: only modify files listed in rewrite_plan.target_files and apply only the requested changes. Do not modify files outside the plan. Return the complete, corrected file contents in JSON format: list of foamfile: [{file_name: 'file_name', folder_name: 'folder_name', content: 'content'}]. Ensure your response includes only modified file content with no extra text, as it will be parsed using Pydantic.
Return ONLY valid JSON (no markdown/backticks). Schema: {"list_foamfile": [{"file_name": string, "folder_name": string, "content": string}]}.
user_prompt:
<foamfiles>list_foamfile=[FoamfilePydantic(file_name='controlDict', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile

startFrom       startTime;

startTime       0;

stopAt          endTime;

endTime         500;

deltaT          1;

writeControl    timeStep;

writeInterval   100;

purgeWrite      0;

writeFormat     ascii;

writePrecision  6;

writeCompression off;

timeFormat      general;

timePrecision   6;

runTimeModifiable true;'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='decomposeParDict', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile

method          scotch;

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvConstraints', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile

    format      ascii;

// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //


// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvSchemes', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      fvSchemes;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

ddtSchemes
{
    default         steadyState;
}

gradSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear;
    grad(U)         cellLimited Gauss linear 1;
}

divSchemes
{
    default         none;
    div(phi,U)      bounded Gauss linearUpwind grad(U);
    div(phi,e)      bounded Gauss linearUpwind default;
    div(phi,h)      bounded Gauss linearUpwind default;
    div(phi,K)      bounded Gauss linearUpwind default;
    div(phi,k)      bounded Gauss linearUpwind default;
    div(phi,epsilon) bounded Gauss linearUpwind default;
    div(phi,Ekp)    bounded Gauss linearUpwind default;
    div(((rho*nuEff)*dev2(T(grad(U))))) Gauss linear;
}

laplacianSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear corrected;
}

interpolationSchemes
{
    default         linear;
}

snGradSchemes
{
    default         corrected;
}

wallDist
{
    method          meshWave;
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvSolution', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      fvSolution;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

solvers
{
    p
    {
        solver          GAMG;
        smoother        GaussSeidel;
        tolerance       1e-06;
        relTol          0.1;
    }

    "(U|h|e|k|epsilon|omega)"
    {
        solver          smoothSolver;
        smoother        symGaussSeidel;
        tolerance       1e-06;
        relTol          0.1;
    }
}

SIMPLE
{
    nNonOrthogonalCorrectors 0;
    pMinFactor      0.1;
    pMaxFactor      1.5;

    residualControl
    {
        p               1e-4;
        U               1e-4;
        "(h|e)"         1e-4;
        "(k|epsilon)"   1e-4;
    }
}

relaxationFactors
{
    fields
    {
        p               0.3;
        rho             0.01;
    }
    equations
    {
        U               0.7;
        "(h|e)"         0.7;
        k               0.7;
        epsilon         0.7;
    }
}

{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      blockMeshDict;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

scale   0.001;

vertices
(
    // Block 0 - inlet straight section (x=-50 to x=0)
    ( -50  25  25 )   // 0
    ( -50  25 -25 )   // 1
    ( -50 -25 -25 )   // 2
    ( -50 -25  25 )   // 3

    (   0  25  25 )   // 4
    (   0  25 -25 )   // 5
    (   0 -25 -25 )   // 6
    (   0 -25  25 )   // 7

    // Block 1 - bend lower section (x=0 to x=25, y=-25 to y=0)
    (  25  0  25 )   // 8
    (  25  0 -25 )   // 9
    (  25 -50 -25 )  // 10
    (  25 -50  25 )  // 11

    // Block 2 - transition section (y=-50 to y=-125)
    (  25 -75  25 )  // 12
    (  25 -75 -25 )  // 13
    (  25 -125 -25 ) // 14
    (  25 -125  25 ) // 15

    // Block 3 - outlet section (x=-500 to x=-25)
    ( -500 -75  25 )  // 16
    ( -500 -75 -25 )  // 17
    ( -500 -125 -25 ) // 18
    ( -500 -125  25 ) // 19
);

blocks
(
    // Block 0: Inlet straight section
    //   Shared face with Block 1: 7 3 2 6 (Block 1 face 4)
    //   Shared face with Block 2: 3 7 6 2 (Block 2 face 0)
    hex (0 1 5 4 3 2 6 7) (10 10 10) simpleGrading (1 1 1)

    // Block 1: Bend corner section
    //   Shared face with Block 0: 7 3 2 6 (Block 0 face 3 2 6 7 reversed)
    //   Shared face with Block 2: 11 13 9 6 (Block 2 face 5)
    hex (7 11 3 9 6 10 2 8) (10 10 10) simpleGrading (1 1 1)

    // Block 2: Transition section
    //   Shared face with Block 1: 11 13 9 6 (Block 1 face 0)
    //   Shared face with Block 3: 13 15 14 10 (Block 3 face 3)
    hex (11 13 15 12 10 9 14 2) (10 10 10) simpleGrading (1 1 1)

    // Block 3: Outlet section
    //   Shared face with Block 2: 13 15 14 10 (Block 2 face 3)
    hex (16 17 18 19 15 14 13 10) (100 10 10) simpleGrading (1 1 1)
);

// ************************************************************************* //')]</foamfiles>

    in file blockDescriptor/blockDescriptor.C at line 106.

<reviewer_analysis># Error Analysis and Resolution

## Error 1: `log.blockMesh` — Block 3 has inward-pointing faces

**Error Message:**
```
Block hex (16 17 18 19 15 14 13 10) ... has inward-pointing faces
    4(16 19 18 17)
```

**Diagnosis:**

The error clearly identifies that face `(16 19 18 17)` of Block 3 is inward-pointing. Let me trace through the geometry:

Vertices:
- 16: `(-500, -75, 25)`, 19: `(-500, -125, 25)`, 18: `(-500, -125, -25)`, 17: `(-500, -75, -25)`

These are ALL at x = -500. This face represents the "bottom" face of Block 3. The face winding is:
- 16→19: `(0, -50, 0)` (along -y)
- 19→18: `(0, 0, -50)` (along -z)
- 18→17: `(0, 50, 0)` (along +y)
- 17→16: `(0, 0, 50)` (along +z)

Applying the right-hand rule: fingers from 16→19 (-y), curl toward 19→18 (-z) — thumb points in the **-x direction**. But for Block 3, this face is the **external** face at x = -500, and the block interior extends in the **+x direction** (toward the bend/outlet). The normal pointing **-x** means the interior is on the wrong side — hence "inward-pointing."

**Fix:** Reverse the winding order of Block 3. Change:
```
hex (16 17 18 19 15 14 13 10)
```
to:
```
hex (16 19 17 18 15 14 13 10)
```

This reverses the bottom face to `(16 19 17 18)` which gives a normal in the **+x direction**, correctly pointing outward for a block that extends in +x.

## Error 2: `log.rhoSimpleFoam` — Cascading error

Since `blockMesh` failed, no mesh was generated. This resolves automatically once blockMesh succeeds.

## Summary of Changes

Only **Block 3** in `blockMeshDict` needs to be changed:
- Change `hex (16 17 18 19 15 14 13 10)` to `hex (16 19 17 18 15 14 13 10)`

This reverses the winding of the bottom face so that the external face at x = -500 has a normal pointing in +x (outward), while the block interior resides in the +x direction. All other blocks, boundary definitions, and configuration files should remain unchanged.</reviewer_analysis>
<rewrite_plan>{'target_files': [{'file': 'system/blockMeshDict', 'changes': 'Change Block 3 vertex ordering from hex (16 17 18 19 15 14 13 10) to hex (16 19 17 18 15 14 13 10) to fix inward-pointing face error'}]}</rewrite_plan>

<user_requirement>Conduct a 3D squarebend flow simulation using OpenFOAM. The computational domain includes multiple regions, with vertices defined as inlet points at (-50, 25, 25) and (-50, 25, -25), outlet points at (-500, -75, 25) and (-500, -75, -25), and mid-bend points like (25, 0, 25) and (25, 0, -25). Follow the same geomtery as the tutorial. Use a start time of 0 seconds, an end time of 500 seconds, a time step of 1 second, and write results every 100 seconds. Use a massflow rate inlet of 0.5 with turbulentBL profile. Outlet is pressureInletOutletVelocity. Temperature has an inlet value of 1000. Pressure inlet has a value of 110000. use kepsilon turbulence model. Use rhoSimpleFoam solver. Use Pr value of 0.71.</user_requirement>

Please update OpenFOAM files according to rewrite_plan only. Only include files from rewrite_plan.target_files in your output.
